name: @radzor/retry-handler
description: Retry failed operations with configurable backoff strategies including exponential, linear, and jitter. Tracks attempt history and provides detailed statistics on retry behaviour.

inputs.name: maxAttempts
inputs.description: Maximum number of retry attempts (including the initial call).

inputs.name: strategy
inputs.description: Backoff strategy to use between retries.

inputs.name: baseDelay
inputs.description: Base delay in milliseconds before the first retry.

inputs.name: jitter
inputs.description: Add random jitter to the delay to prevent thundering herd.

inputs.name: retryOn
inputs.description: Optional predicate to decide whether an error is retryable.

fields.name: lastError
fields.description: Last error encountered, or null if successful.

events.name: onRetry
events.description: Fired before each retry attempt with the computed delay.

events.name: onExhausted
events.description: Fired when all retry attempts are exhausted.

events.name: onSuccess
events.description: Fired when the operation succeeds (on first try or after retries).

actions.name: execute

params.name: fn
params.description: The async operation to execute with retry logic.

actions.description: Execute a function with retry logic applied.

actions.name: getStats
actions.description: Get cumulative statistics across all executions.

connectsTo.description: Alert when all retry attempts exhausted

llm.constraints: Delays use setTimeout; not suitable for sub-millisecond timing. The retryOn predicate should be a pure function. Stats are in-memory only.
